## CheatReader v0.1.25

### Highlights
- Added desktop runtime app disguise settings for the window title, control panel title, tray tooltip, tray menu, and tray icon.
- Added built-in neutral disguise presets: Code Editor, Dev Studio, Terminal, and Notes.
- Added a custom display name field for users who want their own window and tray name.

### Notes
- This release intentionally does not change installer metadata, executable names, bundle identifiers, or app package icons.
- Preset tray icons are original generic assets and do not copy third-party product marks.
